query:
SELECT sba.serviceExternalId, sba.billingItemExternalId, sba.assignmentMethod, s.status, s.locationAddress, s.planName
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId
WHERE sba.customerExternalId = 'C0038';
